_comment: Per-claim-type tolerance rules.  See claims_manifest.json for which type each claim uses.

percentage_pp._doc: Percentage points.  e.g., paper says 58.3%, code gives 56.9% -> delta 1.4 -> PASS

correlation_rho._doc: Spearman / Pearson rho.  e.g., paper says +0.62, code gives +0.59 -> delta 0.03 -> PASS

g_statistic._doc: G-statistics for HCUG.  Relative tolerance 10% because permutation noise.

integer_count._doc: Counts like '16 of 19' must match exactly.

p_value_qualitative._doc: p-values are matched by significance band (<0.001, <0.01, <0.05, n.s.) not exact.

wald_F._doc: Wald F-stats.  Loose tolerance because regression sample sensitive.

psi_asymmetry._doc: psi = p_max_fri - p_min_fri.  Tight tolerance because directly computed.
